Notice Of Motion To Stay Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth A. England, esq. (415-984-8503) of Clark Hill Morris Polich & Purdy for Plaintiffs/Moving party PHILLIP SPRINCIN and KRISTIN SPRINCIN.
Scott A. Freedman, esq. (415-956-8100) of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson for Defendant/opposing party 2225 Baystreet LLC, et al.
Court reporter: Kelly Newton CSR #13849 of Jan Brown & Associates (415-981-3498).

The Court announces its tentative ruling. ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) re: equitable estoppel. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs PHILLIP SPRINCIN and KRISTIN SPRINCIN's Motion To Stay Arbitration is Taken Under Submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Kelly Newton CSR #13849 of Jan Brown & Associates (415-981-3498). (D501)
